examples: I see myself not as a cynic but as a realist.
Theodore Roosevelt was preeminently a realist in foreign relations.
Although Millet was a realist painter, and Van Gogh a post-impressionist, the two paintings still share lots of features.
There is a really good realist critique of the Obama foreign policy to be made.
Now, in the infectiously primitive talking-animal world of "Fantastic Mr. Fox", he's become an ironic realist.
